experience_requirements: 5+ years of experience in fullstack development with strong emphasis on backend systems
Proven experience building and scaling distributed systems or event-driven architectures
key_responsibilities: Design and implement backend services and APIs for AI model inference, resource orchestration, and workload distribution across distributed GPU infrastructure
Build responsive web interfaces for training job management, model deployment workflows, and real-time monitoring dashboards
Contribute to distributed systems using peer-to-peer technologies, specifically the Holepunch stack
Develop APIs for synchronous and asynchronous inference patterns compatible with industry standards
Implement monitoring, logging, and telemetry for high availability and performance
Work with DevOps, AI/ML engineers, and product teams to deliver integrated solutions
Maintain code quality through peer reviews, testing, documentation, and security best practices
success_outcomes: Scale GPU-accelerated cloud services for AI/ML workloads
Make AI deployment workflows accessible to developers and data scientists
Improve production reliability, monitoring, and platform performance
Support decentralized AI infrastructure through distributed and peer-to-peer systems
must_have_checklist: 5+ years fullstack development with strong backend emphasis
Distributed systems or event-driven architecture experience
API design and implementation, including authentication, rate limiting, and versioning
Database proficiency with data modeling and optimization
Networking, security principles, and production systems experience
Real-time data streaming and RPC implementations
Independent remote work and cross-time-zone communication
red_flags: Role emphasizes AI/ML inference, GPU infrastructure, and peer-to-peer protocols that are not listed as required but are central to the role context
JD asks for expert-level Node.js/JavaScript backend development, so recent backend ownership evidence should be explicit
